display.purpose: Tabular numbers as heroes — KPIs, hub counts. Units sit beside at 15px Margin Grey.

headline.purpose: Section titles and hero insight statements.

mono.purpose: Reference numbers and rank indices only — the clerk's rubber stamp.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Action Composer over the navy scrim rgba(11,36,71,0.55).

motion.name: chart-draw
motion.purpose: Outlook chart lines draw left→right; band and annotations fade after.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one filled action per surface — approve, draft, apply.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Draft letter <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.75" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line><polyline points="12 5 19 12 12 19"></polyline></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #12325B; color: #FFFFFF; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; padding: 10px 16px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0B2447; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #12325B; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #12325B; border: 1px solid #12325B; border-radius: 999px; padding: 6px 14px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F1EBDD; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #12325B; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Pathway Pill
components.description: Border-only action-pathway tag: MPLADS / State / Central / Coordination.
components.css: .ds-pill-pathway { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; background: transparent; color: #12325B; border: 1px solid #12325B44; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Urgency Mark
components.description: Dot + label — colour paired with words, never a banner.
components.css: .ds-urgency { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 500; color: #A3311F; font-family: 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-urgency-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #A3311F; }

components.name: Evidence Chip
components.description: Per-source signal count on priority cards.
components.css: .ds-chip-evidence { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 9px 4px 7px; background: #F6F2EA; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12px; color: #14192A; font-family: 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-chip-evidence b { font-weight: 500; } .ds-chip-evidence + .ds-chip-evidence { margin-left: 6px; }

components.name: KPI Stat
components.description: The number is the hero: tabular display numeral, quiet label, hairline progress.
components.html:
MPLADS utilised
₹3.42Cr
68% of ₹5.0 Cr
components.css: .ds-kpi { font-family: 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; min-width: 180px; } .ds-kpi-label { font-size: 12.5px; color: #7E8590; margin-bottom: 10px; } .ds-kpi-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 5px; } .ds-kpi-value { font-size: 30px; font-weight: 500; color: #14192A; letter-spacing: -0.025em; line-height: 1; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-kpi-unit { font-size: 15px; color: #7E8590; } .ds-kpi-track { margin-top: 12px; height: 3px; background: #F1EBDD; border-radius: 999px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-kpi-bar { width: 68.4%; height: 100%; background: #12325B; border-radius: 999px; } .ds-kpi-sub { font-size: 11.5px; color: #A69C86; margin-top: 6px; }

components.name: Form Field
components.description: Stationery-style field from the letter composer.
components.css: .ds-field { display: block; font-family: 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; min-width: 260px; } .ds-field-label { display: block; font-size: 11px; color: #7E8590; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-field-input { width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; background: #FBF8F2; border: 1px solid #E6DFD1; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 13px; color: #14192A; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; } .ds-field-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #12325B; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Saarthi is the dispatch file a trusted senior aide prepares before the MP's day begins: parchment stock, navy ink, a single saffron seal, everything cited and already in priority order. The interface is a civil-service instrument — sober, evidentiary, assured — not a startup dashboard. Warmth comes from the paper, authority from the ink, and life from precise, small colour marks. Its job is triage: the top five issues legible in five minutes by a non-technical reader, every claim traceable to its evidence.
keyCharacteristics: Warm paper surfaces carrying cool, authoritative ink
Numbers typographically privileged: tabular numerals, Indian notation (₹1,00,000)
Colour as annotation, never decoration — every hue has a fixed meaning
Hairline borders and tinted fills instead of shadows; flat at rest
Bilingual by construction: Devanagari set with its own vertical rhythm

rules.name: The One Seal Rule
rules.body: Seal Saffron touches at most a few percent of any screen: the brand bar, one insight accent, one chart line. Its rarity is its authority.

rules.name: The Meaning-Locked Colour Rule
rules.body: Every non-neutral colour has exactly one job. Never borrow a status colour for decoration.

rules.name: The Tabular Rule
rules.body: Every number that could ever sit above another number is tabular and formatted Indian-style: ₹1,00,000, ₹3.42 Cr, 1,842.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: If a resting surface needs separation, it gets a 1px Rule Line border or a one-step tint — never a shadow. Shadows are reserved for popover, modal, tooltip.

dos: Do cite evidence inline: every stat, rank, and AI recommendation carries its source links. If it can't be cited, don't show it.
Do use tabular numerals and Indian number formatting everywhere (₹1,00,000 · ₹3.42 Cr · 1,842).
Do signal urgency with a 5–6px dot + small text label — quiet, precise, paired with words.
Do give Devanagari its 1.7 line-height and test every layout bilingually.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion with a finished-state fallback for every animation.
donts: Don't build the generic SaaS admin template — identical stat cards, blue-purple gradients, rounded-everything.
Don't import flashy consumer-app energy — no gradients-as-decoration, mascots, or confetti.
Don't regress to the dated NIC-style gov portal — dense link walls, beveled buttons, no hierarchy.
Don't drift into Bloomberg-terminal density — Saarthi triages; it never shows everything at once.
Don't cast shadows on resting surfaces, use colored side-stripes thicker than 1px, or gradient text.
Don't put an uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section.
Don't use saffron, green, or the urgency hues outside their locked meanings.
